mapper.sql: select c.*, d.metric_code, d.metric_name, i.implementation_code, i.implementation_name, i.implementation_type from fp_resource_metric_config c left join fp_metric_definition d on d.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and d.id = c.metric_definition_id left join fp_metric_implementation i on i.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and i.id = c.implementation_id
mapper.select: order by c.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from fp_resource_metric_config c left join fp_metric_definition d on d.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and d.id = c.metric_definition_id
select count(1) from fp_resource_metric_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
select count(1) from fp_resource_metric_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and enabled = true
select count(1) from fp_resource_metric_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and last_collect_status = 'ERROR'
select count(distinct object_type || ':' || object_id) from fp_resource_metric_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
where c.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and c.object_type = #{objectType} and c.object_id = #{objectId} and c.metric_definition_id = #{metricDefinitionId}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_resource_metric_config (id, tenant_id, object_type, object_id, object_code, object_name, metric_definition_id, implementation_id, execution_mode, executor_node_id, interval_sec, parameter_json, enabled, task_status, last_collect_status, last_collect_message, last_collect_at, next_collect_at, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{objectType}, #{objectId}, #{objectCode}, #{objectName}, #{metricDefinitionId}, #{implementationId}, #{executionMode}, #{executorNodeId}, #{intervalSec}, #{parameterJson}, #{enabled}, #{taskStatus}, #{lastCollectStatus}, #{lastCollectMessage}, #{lastCollectAt}, #{nextCollectAt}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update fp_resource_metric_config set object_type = #{objectType}, object_id = #{objectId}, object_code = #{objectCode}, object_name = #{objectName}, metric_definition_id = #{metricDefinitionId}, implementation_id = #{implementationId}, execution_mode = #{executionMode}, executor_node_id = #{executorNodeId}, interval_sec = #{intervalSec}, parameter_json = #{parameterJson}, enabled = #{enabled}, task_status = #{taskStatus}, last_collect_status = #{lastCollectStatus}, last_collect_message = #{lastCollectMessage}, last_collect_at = #{lastCollectAt}, next_collect_at = #{nextCollectAt}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from fp_resource_metric_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
